top_signals.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
top_signals.summary: The USDA and Texas officials are working to contain New World screwworm from Zavala County, including establishing an infested zone and enforcing quarantine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA directive for AI executive order to be released this week, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: The binding operational directive will focus in part on “vulnerability alleviation and vulnerability management,” Andersen said in remarks delivered at the TechNet Cyber conference in Baltimore.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
